reason: RNAcentral id_mapping.tsv alone cannot reach ENST↔URS coverage gate for current mRNA universe.

download_checklist.name: Ensembl transcript xref export (GRCh38 / Ensembl release aligned to mRNA master)
download_checklist.purpose: Bridge ENST to RefSeq/INSDC accessions so RNAcentral REFSEQ/ENA mappings can be joined.

download_checklist.name: NCBI gene2refseq
download_checklist.purpose: Fallback ENST→GeneID→RefSeq bridge for transcripts missing direct xref.

download_checklist.name: RNAcentral release notes / checksum file
download_checklist.purpose: Verify integrity/version alignment of id_mapping and auxiliary files.
